scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n NEXT,ELECTRON -c cyan,yellow "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:dev:vscode: ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE= concurrently -k -n NEXT,ELECTRON -c cyan,yellow "next dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: ELECTRON=true next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac
scripts.electron:pack: ELECTRON=true next build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --dir
